purpose: Implement story-scoped changes on dedicated branches using the approved contract, tests, and knowledge base context.
outputs: Single canonical CLI resolver and complete mutation metadata
Default-deny policy engine with immutable decision and use receipts
Exact mutation guard enforced before filesystem, process, Git, provider, and recovery writes
Provider SPI with GitHub CLI, generic Git remote, and local filesystem adapters
Delivery profile v2 with explicit provider bindings and unchanged v1 compatibility
Plain-language per-PR autonomy choice with Italian and English golden journeys
validation: decision and assumption changes are recorded
no unauthorized tool or resource use
Catalog and handler parity covers every command including conditional writers
Negative tests prove denial before the first byte for unknown action, scope, identity, path escape, symlink, TOCTOU, quorum reuse, crash, retry, and tampering
Provider adapters are idempotent observers/verifiers and generic Git rejects unsupported PR state operations
Golden fixtures prove v1 profile bytes, hashes, approvals, JSON fields, and 0.11 compatibility remain unchanged
Italian and English journeys are understandable without plugin documentation and technical terms remain optional
npm run check, full npm test, Node 18/20/24 targeted suites, doctor, package dry run, strict gate, GitGuardian, and CI all pass

contextualization.summary: Implementare governance deny-by-default e delivery provider-neutral mantenendo invariati record, hash e journey v1; ogni PR richiede una scelta di autonomia separata espressa in linguaggio comprensibile.

context_sources.excerpt: # ST-ENT-GOVERNANCE Plan ## Objective Make every local state mutation pass through an explainable deny-by-default governance decision while keeping delivery provider-neutral and preserving all approved v1 behavior. A person must be able to choose the independence level for each pull request in plain language without learning internal plugin terms. ## Scope - In scope - One canonical CLI resolver with explicit action and mutation metadata. - Pure RBAC segregation-of-duties quorum and immutable decision receipts. - Exact-scope enforcement immediately before every state mutation. - Provider SPI with GitHub CLI generic Git remote and local filesystem adapters. - Versioned delivery profile v2 with explicit provider bindings and unchanged v1 hashes. - A mandatory non-reusable autonomy choice for each pull request. - Italian and English plain-language guidance plus golden readability tests. - Out of scope - Hosted identity remote policy service production access and secret handling. - Executing pushes merges deployments or releases from provider adapters. - Rewriting approved v1 records or silently changing the 0.11 compatibility snapshot. ## Assignment - Claim To be recorded after the im

constraints: Nessuna mutazione puo avvenire prima di una decisione allow valida per azione, soggetto, identita e percorso esatti.
Deny prevale sempre; azioni, scope, evidenze, provider o identita sconosciuti falliscono in modo chiuso.
Gli adapter osservano e verificano ma non eseguono push, merge, deploy o release.
I record v1 approvati non vengono riscritti e i loro hash restano byte-per-byte invariati.
La scelta di autonomia vale soltanto per la singola PR e non viene ereditata dal requisito o da PR precedenti.
I messaggi principali spiegano risultato, impatto e prossimo passo senza ceiling, audit_only, checkpointed, receipt, hash o schema.

approvals.summary: Approvo il brief governance esatto sotto la delega enterprise: decisioni deny-by-default prima delle scritture, provider solo osservativi, compatibilita v1 invariata e scelta di autonomia leggibile e separata per ogni PR.

scope.principle: An automation approval is valid only under an explicit delegated approval level or configured automation policy recorded in the summary or evidence.
scope.approval_level: Autonomous completion of approved requirement REQ-ENTERPRISE-CONTROL-PLANE-001-R2 through the eight reserved local delivery stories only.
